reviews.comment:
Muy buenos sándwiches caseros. Hoy en día no es fácil encontrarlos vs los envasados (no me gustan). Saliendo unos pocos km de la autopista Rosario- Cordoba, vale la pena

(Translated by Google)
Excellent homemade sandwiches. These days it's not easy to find them compared to the packaged ones (which I don't like). Located a few kilometers off the Rosario-Cordoba highway, it's well worth the trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNOGJmOHl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Me encanta entrar a esta estación de servicio. Es genial el bar con sus sandwiches caseros de crudo bondiola y salame, también está la opción envasados. Café y medialunas riquísimas

(Translated by Google)
I love going into this gas station. The bar is great with its homemade sandwiches of prosciutto, pork shoulder, and salami; they also have pre-packaged options. Delicious coffee and croissants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwdTR6cF9RRRAB
